$comment: Test-gate map for Air Action Sports. Maps do-not-touch source paths (per docs/audit/06-do-not-touch.md) to the test paths that lock their behavior. Rule: before editing any path under `gates`, run the listed test paths and confirm they pass. After your edit, re-run them — they must still pass. If a test reveals current behavior conflicting with audit-documented behavior, STOP and ask the operator. The `uncovered` section enumerates do-not-touch files without tests yet — their `audit_tests_prescribed` arrays form the post-M1 punch list per docs/audit/09-test-coverage.md. When adding tests for a gated path in a future batch, also append the new test paths to the relevant `gates[<path>].tests` array.

covers: chargeOffSession (M6 B7 — POST /v1/payment_intents with off_session=true + confirm=true; idempotency-keyed)
worker/lib/stripe.js.audit_group: B (signature subset) + M6 B5 + M6 B7 + M6 B9

covers: runStripeFeeSync (nightly reconciliation cron: backfills bookings.stripe_fee_cents/_net/_balance_transaction_id from each charge's true Stripe fee for PAID and REFUNDED bookings — a refund keeps the original fee; per-row guarded; idempotent via the stripe_fee_cents IS NULL candidate filter)

runReviewInviteSweep (03:00 cron: emails each paid/comp booking a per-booking review_token link ~24h after the event ends; sentinel-first claim + roll-both-back on send failure OR sender-decline/deferred; best-effort audit cannot roll back a sent email; blast protection = [now-48h,now-18h] window + REVIEW_LAUNCH_CUTOFF_MS forward fence + per-run LIMIT cap, plus a soft-alarm log on unusually large runs; COALESCE(end_date_iso,date_iso) anchor)

Public attendee-verified reviews API: GET /context (token->form state, RL_TOKEN_LOOKUP), POST / (submit/edit, auto-publish, one-per-booking + 30d/3-edit cap, honeypot 'company', RL_FEEDBACK, paid/comp-only gate), GET /?event= (per-event feed+avg), GET /summary (overall+recent+perEvent), GET /all (paginated). Token-gated, publish-independent visibility (status='published'); whitelisted public output (no email/booking_id/ip_hash/status)

Server-injected review JSON-LD: getOrgReviewAggregate / getEventReviewBundle (shared status='published' predicate; null at zero rows / on error), serializeJsonLd (MANDATORY </script>/<>&/U+2028-9 escaping — the only stored-XSS guard on auto-published review text injected into HTML), buildOrgJsonLd / buildEventJsonLd (real aggregateRating + review[], crawler-visible). Consumed by rewriteHomeJsonLd + rewriteEventOg in worker/index.js

Admin review moderation: GET / (list + event_id/status/rating/q filters + published/hidden/avg summary + bookingFlag for refunded/cancelled bookings; admin-only email/ip_hash behind the cap), PUT /:id (hide/unhide + reason + writeAudit review.hidden/unhidden). Gated by requireCapability('reviews.moderate'). A hide drops the review from every public feed + SSR aggregate (all filter status='published').
POST /api/bookings/checkout — public Stripe Checkout Session creation; pricing pinned by Group A + setupFutureUsage='off_session' (M6 B5) authorizing future off-session damage charges (B7+)
POST /api/webhooks/resend (M7 B8 — Resend bounce/complaint consumer; handleResendEmailEvent)
worker/routes/webhooks.js.audit_group: B + M6 B6 dispute handler + M7 B8 resend consumer

covers: GET /api/admin/bookings (list with rich filters: status, event_id, q, from, to, payment_method, has_refund, waiver_status, min_amount, max_amount, customer_id) — M4 B2b
GET /api/admin/bookings/:id (detail with customer card + activity log + PII masking + audit) — M4 B3a
POST /api/admin/bookings/:id/refund-external (5 methods, always-notify customer per D06) — M4 B3a
POST /api/admin/bookings/:id/detach-saved-pm (M6 B9 — privacy: detach Stripe PM from Customer)
POST /api/admin/bookings/:id/reschedule (move booking to another event — remap event/ticket-type/attendees + adjust sold counts; payment preserved)
POST /api/admin/bookings/:id/resend-waiver-confirmation (re-send waiver receipt per signed attendee)
listCapabilities(env, userId) — async DB-backed; joins role_preset_capabilities + user_capability_overrides; legacy fallback when role_preset_key NULL or M5 tables missing
userHasCapability(env, userId, key) — async DB check with dependency-chain walk via capabilities.requires_capability_key
hasCapability(user, key) — sync; checks user.capabilities array first, falls back to legacy role mapping
requireCapability(key) — Hono middleware factory; lazy-loads capabilities onto user; 401/403 with requiresCapability hint
userCapabilities(user) — sync; backward-compat alias for the M4 stub's import surface
worker/lib/capabilities.js.audit_group: (M5 B2 DB-backed RBAC replacing M4 stub)

covers: legacyRoleToRolePreset(role) — pure mapping owner->event_director, manager->booking_coordinator, staff->staff_legacy
migrateUserToRolePreset(env, userId) — idempotent; assigns role_preset_key based on legacy role
migrateAllUsersToRolePresets(env) — bulk migration with breakdown summary

worker/routes/admin/staff.js.audit_group: (M5 R4 + R17 + post-M5.5 create-flow fix + P1/P3/P4 tabs)

worker/routes/admin/staffDocuments.js.audit_group: (M5 B5 library + post-M5.5 P2 per-person ack)

covers: createPersonForUser (idempotent persons-row creation + primary role + audit)
worker/routes/admin/personsHelpers.js.audit_group: (M5 B3 + post-M5.5 audit-shape fix; called from /setup + /accept-invite)

covers: serveUpload (full — allowlist regex, MIME mapping, 404/500 paths, security headers)
rewriteEventOg (full — DB lookup, all 10 SEO meta selectors, fallback when event missing, slug parsing variants)
scheduled outer dispatch (full — cron-string branching, parallel sweep dispatch, error containment, always-on cron.swept audit row, ctx.waitUntil contract)
worker/index.js.audit_group: G (full), H (outer dispatch only — inner sweeps runReminderSweep/runAbandonPendingSweep/runVendorSweep remain uncovered, see uncovered.worker/index.js)

covers: GET /api/admin/today/active (activeEventToday / eventId / checkInOpen response shape — contract for B5 sidebar + B6 banner)
GET /api/admin/dashboard/upcoming-readiness (top-3 events with capacity + waiver pct — M4 B4d)
GET /api/admin/dashboard/action-queue (4-count aggregate for owner triage — M4 B4d)
worker/routes/admin/dashboard.js.audit_group: (M4 B4b persona dashboard foundation; B4d owner extension)

covers: GET /api/admin/analytics/overview (?event_id + ?period=mtd query params — M4 B4d added MTD scoping for the RevenueSummary widget; 2026-06-23 earned-revenue basis excludes tax + processing fee)
GET /api/admin/analytics/funnel (?days N-day checkout funnel: Created -> Paid -> Waivers -> Checked in — M4 B4e powers the ConversionFunnel widget)
GET /api/admin/analytics/deferred-revenue (recognized vs deferred split of earned revenue by event date — 2026-06-24 DeferredRevenue widget)
worker/routes/admin/analytics.js.audit_group: (M4 B4d owner persona MTD revenue scoping; B4e marketing persona funnel; 2026-06-24 deferred-revenue recognition)

covers: GET/PUT(upsert)/DELETE /api/admin/budgets (monthly per-category budget targets, finances.read/write gated)
worker/routes/admin/finances.js.audit_group: (2026-06-24 expenses + budgets foundation for per-event P&L + P&L-vs-budget)

covers: computeCashFlowForecast (13-week direct-method roll-forward: opening + receipts − disbursements; per-day budget allocation; FR-receipt bucketing; min-closing trough)
GET /api/admin/cash-flow (13-week forecast: opening_cents + weekly_revenue_cents override / trailing-8wk derived run-rate; FR-due + budget reads; finances.read gated)
intervalForTier (cadence rule: 5min default / 30s on event day / 10s during check-in)
PERSONA_LAYOUTS registry (6 persona enum values per migration 0028 + decision D08)
resolveLayout (read user.persona; alias-only personas fall back to roleDerivedDefault)
personaLabel (display name for all 6 personas + legacy role compat)

SIDEBAR registry (Surface 1 IA per docs/m4-discovery/sidebar-ia-audit.md — Home / Today / Events / Bookings / Customers / Rentals / Roster / Scan / Settings group with 10 sub-items; Rentals/Roster/Scan restored to standing nav per M5 B0 D10)
getVisibleItems (filters by dynamic todayActive + requiresFlag + capability predicates)
userHasCapabilityStub (M5 B0 stub mapping capability → minimum legacy role; M5 B2 swaps to DB-backed check)
loadSidebarExpand / saveSidebarExpand (localStorage helpers for Settings group expand state; namespaced aas:admin:sidebar:expand:*)
src/admin/sidebarConfig.js.audit_group: (M4 B5 sidebar IA reorganization; M5 B0 D10 capability-gated standing nav)

covers: pickRecallableBookings (filter customer history to most recent N paid/comp; tolerates camelCase + snake_case timestamp keys)
formatRelativeAge (just now / minutes / hours / days / weeks / months / years)
commandsFromSidebar (derive flat command list from SIDEBAR; honors getVisibleItems predicates for dynamic todayActive + requiresFlag)
filterCommands (case-insensitive substring match; prefix-priority sort; defensive against non-array/non-string-label inputs)
requires1099 / previousTaxYear / shouldAutoLockToday — pure helpers exposed for testability + UI use
formatIrs1099Csv / formatGenericCsv — pure CSV formatters used by the /export endpoint and the bookkeeper rollup
aggregate1099TotalsForYear (env, taxYear) — I/O wrapper that powers GET /api/admin/1099-thresholds and GET /export
getYearLock / lockTaxYear — I/O wrappers used by GET / and POST /lock-year + the auto-lock cron sweep

runTaxYearAutoLockSweep — nightly cron wired into worker/index.js 03:00 UTC dispatch; auto-locks the previous tax year on March 1+ and sends w9_reminder to threshold-meeting recipients with missing legal_name/EIN
EVENT_DAY_WINDOW_MS (30-hour window starting 00:00 UTC of event date_iso) + ACTIVITY_KINDS (4-element frozen list mapping to 0037 schema columns)
randomEventDaySessionId / isEventActive / eventDayWindowExpired — pure helpers exposed for testability + middleware
startEventDaySession / getActiveEventDaySession / getEventDaySessionById — I/O wrappers used by the session route + middleware
endEventDaySession (writes audit row; reason bound positionally) + bumpActivityCounter (whitelist-validated kind → column mapping for R13/R14/R16) + touchActivity (heartbeat)
requireEventDayAuth — Hono middleware chains portal-cookie verify -> session lookup -> portal_session ownership check -> event-window enforcement (auto-ends on event_window_closed)
POST /api/event-day/sessions/start (portal-cookie + event-staffed gate; idempotent reuse if active session exists for person+event)
POST /api/event-day/sessions/end (set signed_out_at + clear cookie + audit; gated by requireEventDayAuth)
GET /api/event-day/sessions/me (counters shape used by HQ dashboard in R15)
FIELD_RENTAL_STATUSES + transition matrix (8-state graph with operator-confirmed back-reverts sent→draft + agreed→sent)
allowedTransitions / validateStatusTransition — pure helpers used by /:id/status + /:id/cancel + lifecycle audits
parseAddonFees — JSON or array; rejects >20 items, label >100 chars, non-integer or negative cents
computePricing — server-trusted: total = site_fee + sum(addons.cents) - discount + tax; rejects negative total
formatFieldRental / formatFieldRentalContact — DB row → API shape with PII masking (notes / notes_sensitive / contact email+phone)
GET /api/admin/field-rentals (list with status/site/customer/engagement/coi filters; q PII-aware free-text search; pagination + order whitelist)
GET /api/admin/field-rentals/:id (detail + contacts + site/customer JOIN; PII unmask audits customer_pii.unmasked)
POST /api/admin/field-rentals (conflict-detection 409; bypass_conflict cap + acknowledgeConflicts override; server-trusted pricing recompute)
PUT /api/admin/field-rentals/:id (rejects status/schedule changes; recomputes total_cents on pricing-input change; archived rejected)
POST /api/admin/field-rentals/:id/cancel (sets cancelled_at + cancellation_reason + deposit_retained; audit field_rental.cancelled)
POST /api/admin/field-rentals/:id/reschedule (re-runs conflict check with excludeFieldRentalId; same bypass override path)
POST /api/admin/field-rental-documents (multipart upload + magic-byte sniff via worker/lib/magicBytes.js; 10MB cap; R2 key field_rentals/<rental>/<doc>.<ext>)
kind='coi' required metadata (carrier/policy/amount/effective/expires); denormalizes field_rentals.coi_status='received' + coi_expires_at + requirements_coi_received=1
kind='agreement' requires live SUA template (returns 409 with hint when none exists); captures sua_body_sha256_snapshot for integrity check; denormalizes requirements_agreement_signed=1
Versioning: new agreement or coi upload retires prior live row (retired_at = now)
GET /api/admin/field-rental-documents?rental_id=… (list; COI carrier/policy/amount fields masked unless field_rentals.coi.read_pii)
GET /api/admin/field-rental-documents/:docId/download (proxies R2 bytes; audit field_rental_document.downloaded with ip_address)
POST /api/admin/field-rental-payments (per-kind capability gating: deposit_record / balance_record / write; kind='refund' rejected — refunds only via /refund endpoint)
Aggregate sync on received: kind=deposit/full syncs field_rentals.deposit_*; kind=balance/full syncs balance_* (full syncs BOTH)
Auto-transition rental agreed → paid on first received deposit/balance/full payment (writes status_changed audit)
Refused 409 on cancelled/refunded parent rental (except kind='refund' which is already rejected upstream)
GET /api/admin/field-rental-payments?rental_id=… (gated by field_rentals.read.financials; reference + notes PII-gated)
PUT /api/admin/field-rental-payments/:paymentId (pending→received transition triggers aggregate sync + auto-flip; refunded/void rejected)
POST /api/admin/field-rental-payments/:paymentId/refund (canonical refund flow; validates amount ≤ original; reverseAggregateOnRefund re-binds to newer received row OR clears aggregate)

computeArAging (field-rental A/R aging buckets + DSO) / computePerEventPnl / computeBudgetVsActual / computeStripeFees (accounting-suite shapers; computeStripeFees is refund-aware — merges refunded-booking fee loss + netKept)

buildFtsMatchQuery(q) — injection-safe FTS5 MATCH builder (per-token char-strip + double-quote + prefix *; null when no usable input)

GET /api/admin/audit-log — q full-text via FTS5 (audit_log_fts MATCH) when the audit_log_fts flag is on + index exists; LIKE fallback otherwise + on FTS error; structured filters (action/target_type/user_id/from/to) + pagination

ARIA table semantics for the virtualized-list primitive: role=table + aria-rowcount (incl. header) + aria-colcount; sticky/spacer/row wrappers role=presentation so the a11y tree flattens to table>row>cell; consumers tag the header (role=row/columnheader) + rows (role=row/cell + aria-rowindex/colindex). Used by AdminEvents / AdminPromoCodes / AdminRoster / AdminRentalAssignments.
src/admin/VirtualizedList.jsx.audit_group: (M8 — ARIA table roles on virtualized tables; builds on #241 region pass)

covers: the 9 named senders (booking_confirmation, admin_notify, waiver_request, etc.)
